message.content: <local-command-caveat>Caveat: The messages below were generated by the user while running local commands. DO NOT respond to these messages or otherwise consider them in your response unless the user explicitly asks you to.</local-command-caveat>

content.text: Now I understand. The `showValidSwapTargets` dims tiles that can't be swapped with. I need to change it so it only highlights (doesn't dim others) when the selected tile has extended lane swap or teleport capabilities — not for normal adjacent swaps.
I need to check if the selected tile has extended/teleport abilities before showing swap targets. I'll add a check at the start of `showValidSwapTargets`:

content.content: The file /Users/garreltmock/Projects/match-2048/src/input-handler.js has been updated successfully.

content.text: Now let me check the imports to make sure all those tile check functions are available.

All functions are already imported. The change is complete — `showValidSwapTargets` now early-returns for normal tiles, only showing the dimming highlights when the selected tile has teleport or extended lane swap ability.
